items.reason: Adds routing to the new log sampler design for unified random sampling work.
Adds LogSampler ownership, routing, and source files to the logging module overview.
Documents the new request/access/diagnostic sample rates, derivation rules, propagation model, and hot-path constraints.
Removes the obsolete client-side DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT entry, matching the worker-authoritative sampling model.
Replaces log_rate_limit documentation with the new random sampling rates, derivation behavior, and configuration entrypoints.
Replaces the dscli log_rate_limit option with request_sample_rate, access_sample_rate, diagnostic_sample_rate, and derivation semantics.
Still documents log_rate_limit, DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT, and LogRateLimiter register sync instead of the new LogSampler and LogSampleConfigPb model.
Still says Trace creates local decisions when log_rate_limit is enabled and ties request sampling ownership to LogRateLimiter.
Still frames slow PLOG bypass behavior around log_rate_limit and LogRateLimiter instead of the new diagnostic sampling path.
